ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #67, REPORT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Thomas for William Olds.

The Court stated that it had no further questions regarding the Sixty Sixth Account and the Sixty Seventh Account and asked Counsel to include fees in the Sixty Eighth Account when filed. The Court granted the accounting petitions (subject to review of the orders).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
